title: Client Side Crystals
description:
Makes your crystals show instantly client side 
when crystaling to look look like zero ping. (Works with Marlow's optimizer) Allowed on VTL and mcpvpclub.
body:
**ClientSideCrystals**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/Client-Side-Crystals)
--- Makes end crystals appear instantly on your screen the moment you place them no matter your ping - giving better looking crystaling and better timing feedback in crystalpvp. no packets are changed crystaling is still handled like normal. _It’s purely client-side and doesn’t change how crystals behave on the server, so it’s not a cheat or advantage mod, just a visual prediction and then it snaps back to the real crystal right as the server confirms the real one but it fills the gap of the crystal not existing so it looks instant._ Requires: - [Silicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/silicons/versions) Allowed on: - VTL (mctiers.com) - mcpvp.club - pvptiers.com (Lurrns tierlist) - napvp.us - catpvp - crystalranked - crackedpvp.club - applepvp.com - nova tiers - and more! **Check out my other mods!:** - [Custom Anchors Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-anchors) - [Crystal Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystal-glow) - [Anchor Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/anchor-glow) Join the discord to get notified for new updates --- **1.21.11 and up recommended for best visuals (final version)** If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow 0.16.0 Fabric loader and newer Please report any bugs in my discord. Works perfectly with Marlow’s Optimizer and other server-side optimizers, this includes server side optimizers that place/break crystals for you since you still see the real crystal and most of the time you're seeing the real crystal. this basiclly just bridges the gap between the crystal not existing and it existing ### FAQ - Is this cheats? No. crystals are still handled like vanilla this just places a client side crystal instantly for instant visual feedback. It looks "sus" or 'cheaty" but I can assure you that's only for you're pov for others it looks as if you were crystaling without it, it's the crystal disappearing and the actual crystal visually appearing they show up at a different height and rotation. Report any bugs to me as this is a very version fragile mod [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
